title: Malaysia Aerospace & Defence Industry Mission to Australia

delegation_members.name: Tan Sri Dr. Syed Azman Syed Ibrahim
General Tan Sri Muhamad Norazlan Aris
delegation_members.role: Chief of Royal Malaysian Air Force

key_outcomes: Strategic Collaboration Agreement signed between Weststar Defence Industries and Rocket Technologies International (RTI)
Bilateral cooperation strengthened in aerospace and defence sectors
significance: HIGH — Defence Minister-led bilateral mission with military, intelligence, parliamentary, and industry delegation. Landmark Malaysia-Australia defence industrial cooperation agreement.
